use_cases: Two-factor authentication flow during user login
Account verification during registration or password reset
Transaction approval and payment confirmation in banking apps
Secure session verification for enterprise applications
One-time code entry for multi-device synchronization
ai_summary: An animated OTP (One-Time Password) input component featuring staggered digit reveal animations with fade effects. The component displays a security-themed card with animated digits cycling through auto-generated codes, designed for 2FA and verification flows. Includes dark mode support and configurable animation timing for integration into login and authentication interfaces.
